info.title: GherkinGenerator
info.description: AI-powered Acceptance Criteria to Gherkin feature file generator. Optionally scans assemblies for existing Reqnroll/SpecFlow step definitions.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: AI-powered Acceptance Criteria to Gherkin feature file generator

options.name: --assembly
options.description: Path to a .NET assembly DLL to scan for Reqnroll/SpecFlow step definitions

options.name: --features
options.description: Directory containing existing .feature files to integrate with

options.name: --input
options.description: File containing acceptance criteria (reads from stdin if omitted)

options.name: --insecure
options.description: Disable SSL/TLS certificate validation (for enterprise proxies with self-signed certificates) [default: False]
